title: Hindi — Beginner
description: Complete beginner course for Hindi with 12 chapters covering greetings, numbers, food, travel, and more.

phrase.breakdown: Universal Hindi greeting; literally I bow to you.

questions.prompt: Fill in the blank to complete the greeting

phrase.breakdown: Also used at start of sentence for yes/no questions.
Can mean quickly, soon, or early.

options.translation: I wake up in the morning
Tomorrow I will go to the market

scenarios.title: Ordering Chai at a Stall
scenarios.description: You are at a roadside chai stall in a bustling Indian market.
tasks: Ask what kinds of chai they have

phrasebook.translation: Brother, please give me one tea.
Please give me a samosa too.
Please give me one more tea.
